name: date-fns-tz

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-writing offsets when you need pure functions to format an instant in a specified IANA time zone or convert between wall-clock time and UTC, because native AI implementations fail at DST, time-zone abbreviations, and local calendar boundaries.
en.why_valuable: AI reduces time zones to fixed hour offsets by default and cannot reliably handle DST or historical offsets; date-fns-tz reuses browser Intl and provides reproducible functions for formatInTimeZone, toZonedTime, fromZonedTime, and offset queries.

data_in.note: formatInTimeZone consumes a real instant plus an IANA zone; fromZonedTime instead interprets a wall-clock value with no offset in that zone and returns a real Date. Do not conflate the two semantics.

schema.instant: string | number | Date -- ISO instant, millisecond epoch, or Date
schema.timeZone: string -- an IANA zone supported by Intl
schema.format?: string -- date-fns format token, default 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssXXX'

when_to_use: 需要用纯函数把 instant 格式化到指定 IANA 时区、或在 wall-clock 与 UTC 间换算时用它而非手写 offset,因为原生 AI 在 DST、时区缩写与本地日历边界上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认把时区简化成固定小时差,做不到可靠处理 DST 与历史 offset;date-fns-tz 复用浏览器 Intl,把 formatInTimeZone、toZonedTime、fromZonedTime 和 offset 查询收敛成可复算函数。

data_in.note: formatInTimeZone 吃一个真实 instant + IANA zone;fromZonedTime 则把无 offset 的 wall-clock 解释为该 zone 后返回真实 Date,两者不可混成同一语义。

schema.instant: string | number | Date —— ISO instant、毫秒 epoch 或 Date
schema.timeZone: string —— Intl 支持的 IANA zone
schema.format?: string —— date-fns format token,默认 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssXXX'

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;依赖宿主 Intl 与 date-fns peer。
provides.outputs: 指定时区的格式化字符串、代表目标 wall-clock 的 Date、由 wall-clock 反解出的 UTC Date、或毫秒 offset。

peer.note: 上游声明的 peer;日期加减、startOfDay 等日历算术由 date-fns 消费 toZonedTime 的 Date,完成后再用 fromZonedTime 还原 instant。

boot.note: toZonedTime 返回的仍是原生 Date,其默认 toString 会按浏览器本地时区显示;面向用户输出必须继续用 formatInTimeZone,不要用 Date.toString 判断目标时区。

isolation.evidence: Verified: +esm exports `fe as formatInTimeZone, le as fromZonedTime, S as toZonedTime, me as getTimezoneOffset` — all four import names are real named exports in 3.2.0. README confirms `getTimezoneOffset(timeZone: string, date?: Date|number): number` (matches api_surface order timeZone-then-instant). Schema instant/timeZone/format are positional-mapped correctly in boot. +esm bundle: 0 DOM/style/event APIs — pure functions over Intl. Peer date-fns ^3||^4 is real; +esm resolves it.
